    1. sprayCircle(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int, int)

Class AbstractSpray

java.lang.Object
brush.AbstractBrush
brush.AbstractSpray
All Implemented Interfaces:
Paintable
Direct Known Subclasses:
SprayBrush
public abstract class AbstractSpray extends AbstractBrush
Base class for spray-style brushes.

Extends AbstractBrush and adds a reusable sprayCircle(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int, int) helper for generating randomized spray patterns.

Subclasses only need to define how a “stamp” triggers this spray method with custom density, radius, or behavior.

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractSpray

      public AbstractSpray(int baseSize, double speedScale)
      Creates a spray brush with a base size and speed scaling.
      Parameters:
      baseSize - initial spray radius before scaling
      speedScale - factor controlling reduction when moving fast

  • Method Details

    • sprayCircle

      protected void sprayCircle(CanvasData canvas, double x, double y, int radius, int colorIndex, int layer, int particles)
      Sprays a number of random particles inside a circle with radius radius.

      Algorithm:

      • Picks a random angle from 0 to 2π
      • Picks a distance using √random for uniform area distribution
      • Converts polar → Cartesian to find pixel coordinate
      • Writes that pixel into the canvas
      Parameters:
      canvas - target canvas
      x - center X coordinate
      y - center Y coordinate
      radius - spray radius
      colorIndex - color palette index
      layer - canvas layer (used for wiggle)
      particles - number of spray dots (density)
